title: Yellow Black Japanese Fashion Cover Illustration AI
sourceTitle: Yellow Black Japanese Fashion Cover Illustration AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimalist yellow-black Japanese fashion magazine cover illustration built around adult female fashion model in a structured oversized coat. Subject: adult female fashion model in a structured oversized coat holds quiet detached runway-cover pose, with elongated editorial proportions, quiet detached presence, simplified fashion silhouette, and elegant sharp edges. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Vertical 9:16 fashion cover composition with one centered or slightly offset full-body or three-quarter subject, slim silhouette, calm pose, large empty background space, and crisp readable outline. Signature Elements: Yellow-black fashion cover mood, elongated detached model, large negative space, sharp color blocks, almost lineless cel shading, quiet luxury attitude, and high-contrast editorial silhouette. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Fixed high-fashion yellow-black system: bright yellow, golden yellow, and amber as dominant field colors; cream white, milk white, and pale skin tones as subject base; pure black, charcoal, and deep gray-black for hard-edged shadows; only tiny ochre, caramel, taupe, or muted orange-red accents. Lighting: Strong upper-left light with transparent highlights, decisive hard-edged dark shadow planes, and sharp yellow-black contrast. Materials: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Keep the image vertical, minimal, mature, fashion-forward, clean, and text-free;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
